temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A woman with reddish-brown hair, her face partially obscured by a blurry foreground object, looks on with a deeply concerned and somber expression. Her lips are slightly parted, and her eyes are downcast. (Storyline: This shot establishes a tense and emotional atmosphere, introducing a character who is clearly distressed by an unseen event.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Neutral, questioning. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:02-00:05) A close-up shows a man with a heavily bruised and swollen face lying on his back. His eyes are closed, and his skin is raw and red. A medical device is being pressed against his forehead and eye by a person wearing a black glove. (Storyline: This reveals the source of the woman's distress: a severely injured man. The medical procedure suggests he is undergoing an examination or treatment.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Affirmative. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint, indistinct sounds of movement.)
